nasb.text: Now the priests, the Levites, the gatekeepers, the singers, some of the people, the temple servants and all Israel, lived in their cities. And when the seventh month came, the sons of Israel were in their cities.

esv.text: So the priests, the Levites, the gatekeepers, the singers, some of the people, the temple servants, and all Israel, lived in their towns. And when the seventh month had come, the people of Israel were in their towns.

cnv.text: 於是祭司、利未人、守門的、歌唱者、一部分人民、作殿役的，和以色列眾人都住在自己的城裡。

ccb.text: 于是，祭司、利未人、殿门守卫、歌乐手、一些民众、殿役和全体以色列人都住在自己的城里。到了七月，以色列人都住在各自的城里。
